<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band11_chunk003.pdf#page=20 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band11 p138 -->

LANDKREIS TRAUNSTEIN · SCHNAITSEE


[[File:Band11_chunk003_p020_img001.jpg|thumb|B Die Erdteile huldigen dem apokalyptischen Lamm (Franz Joseph Soll 1791/92)]]



[[File:Band11_chunk003_p020_img002.jpg|thumb]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band11 p139 -->


Bereinigter Text:
